author: Erica Layer
site_description: Operational clarity, sustainable growth, and the space to lead. Practical insights from a Fractional COO.

clusters.name: Founder Dependency
clusters.pillar_keyword: how to stop being the bottleneck as a founder
clusters.description: How founders move from doing everything to building teams that work without them
keywords: how to delegate as a founder
building a team that runs itself
question_types: Why does everything still run through me?
How do I delegate without losing control?
What does a founder-independent operation look like?
When should a founder hire a COO?
How do I build trust with my team so I can let go?

clusters.name: Operational Clarity
clusters.description: Processes, documentation, and systems that actually get used
question_types: How do I create processes without bureaucracy?
Why doesn't my team follow the processes we built?
What systems does a 10-person team actually need?
How do I get knowledge out of people's heads?
When is the right time to document processes?

clusters.name: Team Alignment
clusters.description: Priorities, accountability, and decision-making that keeps teams moving in the same direction
question_types: How do I get my leadership team aligned?
What's the right meeting cadence for a 15-person company?
How do OKRs actually work in practice?
How do I make faster decisions without losing buy-in?
Why does my team keep working on the wrong things?

clusters.name: Fractional Leadership
clusters.description: What fractional COOs do, who they're for, and how to work with one effectively
keywords: fractional COO vs full time COO
when to hire a fractional COO
question_types: What does a fractional COO actually do day to day?
Is a fractional COO right for my stage of growth?
How much does a fractional COO cost?
What's the difference between a fractional COO and a consultant?
How quickly can a fractional COO make an impact?

clusters.name: Sustainable Growth
clusters.description: Focus, pacing, and the operational foundation that makes growth last
question_types: How do I grow without everything breaking?
Why does scaling feel so chaotic?
How do I know if we're trying to do too much?
What does sustainable growth actually look like?
How do I protect my team during rapid growth?

clusters.name: Hiring & Roles
clusters.description: Right people, right seats, and building teams that thrive
keywords: how to hire your first team
question_types: How do I know when I need to hire?
What's the right team structure for a 20-person company?
How do I keep people once I've hired them?
How do I set up new hires to succeed?
When should I promote from within vs hire externally?

clusters.name: Leadership Mindset
clusters.description: The personal and professional habits that make leaders more effective
question_types: How do I lead when I'm exhausted?
What habits do the best leaders have?
How do I stop second-guessing my decisions?
What does good leadership actually look like at my stage?
How do I build confidence as a first-time CEO?
